safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated. Avoid in pregnancy; Avoid with sedative sensitivity; Avoid in liver disease; Avoid combining with sedatives, generally well tolerated; Avoid use during pregnancy unless advised by a clinician, alcohol or or other CNS depressants; Avoid combining with sedatives.
